Class Checklist

java.lang.Object
model.AbstractData
model.AbstractCollection<Task>
model.Checklist
All Implemented Interfaces:
IObservable, ISerializable
public class Checklist extends AbstractCollection<Task>
Defines a checklist that can contain multiple Task items while extending AbstractCollection to provide list tools, observability and serialization.

    getDisplayMode()
    Returns the current display mode of the checklist.

    Counts the number of tasks in the checklist that are still unfinished.

    Sets the display mode for the checklist.

    Toggles the checklist display between Checklist.DisplayMode.CARDS and Checklist.DisplayMode.TEXT.

  • Constructor Details

    • Checklist

      public Checklist(org.json.JSONObject checklistData)
      Creates a checklist from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      checklistData - JSONObject representing the checklist; must contain a title and optionally an items array of serialized Task objects.

    • Checklist

      public Checklist()
      Creates an empty checklist.

  • Method Details

    • toJSON

      public org.json.JSONObject toJSON()
      Serializes this checklist into a JSON object.
      Specified by:
      toJSON in interface ISerializable
      Overrides:
      toJSON in class AbstractCollection<Task>
      Returns:
      JSONObject containing the collection title, the preferred display mode and the JSON data of its items

    • setDisplayMode

      public void setDisplayMode(Checklist.DisplayMode displayMode)
      Sets the display mode for the checklist.
      Parameters:
      displayMode - The new Checklist.DisplayMode to use for this checklist.

    • toggleDisplayMode

      public void toggleDisplayMode()
      Toggles the checklist display between Checklist.DisplayMode.CARDS and Checklist.DisplayMode.TEXT.

    • getDisplayMode

      public Checklist.DisplayMode getDisplayMode()
      Returns the current display mode of the checklist.

    • getNumberOfOpenTasks

      public int getNumberOfOpenTasks()
      Counts the number of tasks in the checklist that are still unfinished.
